subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
title: WE ANSWER YOUR QUESTIONS
description: Here we answer the most common questions about our equipment, purchasing process, and technical support.

items.question: What type of machinery do you offer?
items.answer: We offer industrial equipment such as electric forklifts, stackers, and scissor lift platforms designed to optimize material handling and lifting operations in various industrial environments.

items.question: Do you sell or also rent equipment?
items.answer: We mainly focus on selling machinery. Our team can advise you to find the best solution according to your operational needs.

items.question: How can I request a quotation?
items.answer: You can request a quotation directly from our website in the contact section, or get in touch with our team by phone or email.

items.question: Do your machines come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes. All our equipment includes a 12-month warranty according to the manufacturer's specifications and specialized technical support.

items.question: Do you offer international shipping?
items.answer: Yes, we offer international shipping. Delivery times and costs depend on the type of equipment and the destination country.

items.question: Do you provide spare parts and technical service?
items.answer: We provide technical support and assistance for spare parts, maintenance, and operation of the equipment we supply.
